args: Add lightweight regression coverage for the prompt-classification heuristics in the model-router extension without adding dependencies. Prefer Node built-ins if you introduce tests or fixtures. Focus on explicit review detection, tool-heavy implementation routing, and orchestration escalation. Keep the production extension behavior intact unless you need a small refactor to make the logic testable.
